title: Boonchu 8
original_title: บุญชู 8 เพื่อเธอ
overview: Life after the marriage of Boonchu and Molee. good news is Molee gets pregnant but bad news is she accidentally hit by a stray bullet of an escaping robber. Boonchu and friends vow for her life.
